backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types and CRUD operations for episodes, characters, content, contact requests, and user profiles, with admin-only access control enforced via AccessControl mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including sidebar and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with the page title 'Whispers of the White Moon' that mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/RUN-LOCAL-AND-DEPLOY-IC.md: Step-by-step guide for running the project locally and deploying it to the Internet Computer mainnet, including prerequisites, deployment verification checklists, and troubleshooting tips.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up React Query, routes between the public site and the admin dashboard based on the URL path, and composes all public section components with episode selection state.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Simple section component that renders the anime series synopsis from the site config with a section header and readable typography.
frontend/src/components/AdminCharactersP: Admin panel for managing characters, supporting list, add, edit, and delete operations with loading/error/empty states, confirmation dialogs, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AdminContactRequ: Admin panel for viewing, filtering, toggling status, deleting, and CSV-exporting contact requests, using React Query hooks and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AdminContentPane: Admin panel component for managing content entries, supporting list view with add, edit, and delete operations via a ContentForm modal and React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Top-level admin dashboard component that handles Internet Identity authentication, admin role verification, and renders a sidebar with section-based navigation to sub-panels (episodes, characters, content, contacts, roles).
frontend/src/components/AdminEpisodesPan: Admin panel for managing episodes, displaying a sorted list by season and episode number with add, edit, and delete functionality using an EpisodeForm modal.
frontend/src/components/AdminRolePanel.t: Admin panel for role management that displays the current user's principal ID and allows granting admin roles to other users by principal ID.
frontend/src/components/AdminSection.tsx: Legacy monolithic admin section component combining Internet Identity login, contact request management (list, status toggle, CSV export), and admin role granting in a single component.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Renders the admin dashboard sidebar with navigation items (Episodes, Characters, Content, Contacts, Roles) for both desktop and mobile layouts, supporting active section highlighting and mobile overlay close behavior.
frontend/src/components/CharacterForm.ts: A form component for creating or editing a character, using react-hook-form with fields for name, role, bio, image URL, weapon, power, and traits, and calling create/update mutation hooks on submit.
frontend/src/components/CharacterMatchQu: Implements a multi-step personality quiz with 7 questions that collects trait answers and computes a character match score against animeSiteConfig characters, invoking an onComplete callback with the best match.
frontend/src/components/CharacterMatchRe: Displays the quiz result showing the matched character's image, stats, bio, and a match percentage progress bar, with a restart button to retake the quiz.
frontend/src/components/CharacterMatchSe: Manages the overall character match feature flow across three states (not-started, in-progress, completed), rendering the intro card, quiz, or result component accordingly.
frontend/src/components/CharactersSectio: Fetches and displays all characters from the backend in a responsive grid with loading skeletons, error/empty states, and character cards showing image, role, bio, weapon, power, and trait badges.
frontend/src/components/ClansSection.tsx: Renders a grid section displaying seven elemental clans, each with a sigil image, name, and description. Uses static clan data and a shared SectionHeader component.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Provides a contact form with email, topic, and message fields, including validation and submission via a React Query mutation. Shows toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ContentForm.tsx: Admin form for creating or editing content entries (announcements, lore, news, etc.) using react-hook-form and React Query mutations. Supports content type, title, body, and optional image URL fields.
frontend/src/components/ContentSection.t: Displays a public grid of news and update content items fetched via React Query, with loading skeletons, error states, and empty state messaging. Each card shows a badge, title, body, and optional image.
frontend/src/components/EpisodeForm.tsx: Admin form for creating or editing episodes with fields for title, description, video URL, thumbnail URL, season, and episode numbers. Uses react-hook-form and React Query mutations with toast feedback.
Renders a sorted list of episodes fetched via React Query, with thumbnail, season/episode label, title, and description. Clicking an episode selects it and scrolls to the video section.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a site footer with copyright, a YouTube channel link, and a Cash App donation handle.
Empty file with no content or exports defined.
frontend/src/components/GallerySection.t: Empty file with no content or exports defined.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, animated title/tagline from config, and two CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to 'about' and 'characters' sections.
frontend/src/components/IntroSection.tsx: Displays an introduction video (iframe or native video) from config with a fallback external link button, plus the anime tagline and first synopsis paragraph.
frontend/src/components/RewardsSection.t: Donation section showing a Cash App handle and a list of reward tiers with icons, donation ranges, and perks sourced from animeSiteConfig.
frontend/src/components/SectionHeader.ts: Simple reusable section header component that renders a centered title with a decorative accent underline.
frontend/src/components/TopNav.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links to all page sections, scroll-based background change, mobile hamburger menu, and an admin dashboard link shown only to authenticated admins.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Video player section that renders a selected episode as either a native video or an embedded iframe, with placeholder text when no episode is selected.
frontend/src/components/WorldbuildingSec: Displays worldbuilding lore cards covering clans, clan eyes, power system, rank system, and the Shiranagi family, all sourced from animeSiteConfig.
frontend/src/content/animeSiteConfig.ts: Central configuration object for the 'Whispers of the White Moon' anime site, containing the title, synopsis, CTA buttons, intro video URLs, donation reward tiers, and detailed worldbuilding data (clans, power system, rank system, and character lore).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the ICP backend, covering admin checks, user profiles, contact requests, episodes, characters, and content management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines light/dark CSS custom properties for a manga/ink-on-paper theme, and adds a scoped dark admin dashboard theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeIntroEmbedUr: Utility function that converts YouTube and Vimeo share URLs into embed-friendly iframe URLs, leaving direct video file URLs unchanged.
frontend/src/utils/scrollToSection.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls the page to a DOM element by ID with a configurable offset.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadows, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking a single pending feature request to deploy application version 50 (including admin dashboard delete contact requests) to the Internet Computer mainnet.
